name: OmopMeasurementCodes
title: OMOP Measurement-domain codes (example subset)
description: Codes that route a FHIR Observation to the OMOP `measurement` table. Authoritative expansion: vocab.concept WHERE domain_id = 'Measurement' AND standard_concept = 'S'. The compose below lists illustrative examples only — the real expansion comes from the loaded Athena vocabularies (~94,791 standard concepts).

extension.valueString: SELECT vocabulary_id, concept_code, concept_name FROM vocab.concept WHERE domain_id = 'Measurement' AND standard_concept = 'S'
